themes.label: Provision
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes God’s supplying care, nourishment, sufficiency, or generous provision. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "And she said unto him, Give me a blessing: for thou hast given me a south land; give me also...". Word-study detail reinforces "שֻׁלְחָנִ֔י: their meat under my table - a table (as spread out); by implication, a meal".
